news-global-econ.title: Marriages Hit Post-Pandemic Low in China as Population Declines
news-global-econ.description:
China’s Ministry of Civil Affairs issued a dismaying report on marriage registrations, finding them down by 6.2% in the first quarter.

news-global-econ.title: Pro-Migration Canadian Liberal Loses Election to Pakistani Immigrant
news-global-econ.description:

news-global-econ.title: Trump 'seriously considering' plan to make Venezuela and its $40 trillion in oil permanent part of USA
news-global-econ.description: President Trump eyes oil-rich Venezuela as a potential 51st state, citing the country's estimated $40 trillion in oil reserves as key motivation.

news-global-soc.title: Iran regime power players may eye Russia in Assad-style escape as US talks falter: expert
news-global-soc.description: An expert warns Iran's IRGC leadership may flee to Russia amid regime instability after high-stakes U.S. negotiations collapsed and military fractures deepen.
